## Checks

- [ ] Ran `go test ./...`
- [ ] Updated docs when behavior changed

## Template Contributions

If this PR adds or changes files under `templates/programs/`:

- [ ] Filename matches the template name slug, like `Push Pull Legs` -> `push-pull-legs.json`
- [ ] Template validates with `:template validate templates/programs/<file>.json`
- [ ] Template includes at least one workout
- [ ] Every workout includes at least one exercise
- [ ] Sets and reps are non-negative integers
